creator: lars@netapp.com
text:
The freebsdnic@mailbox.intel.com email address mentioned in the em(4), ixgb(4) and ixgbe(4) man pages as well as various READMEs bounces:

The following message to <freebsdnic@mailbox.cps.intel.com> was undeliverable.
The reason for the problem:
5.1.0 - Unknown address error 550-'5.1.1 <freebsdnic@mailbox.cps.intel.com>... User unknown'
Reporting-MTA: dns; fmsmga001.fm.intel.com

Final-Recipient: rfc822;freebsdnic@mailbox.cps.intel.com
Action: failed
Status: 5.0.0 (permanent failure)
Remote-MTA: dns; [10.9.159.101]
Diagnostic-Code: smtp; 5.1.0 - Unknown address error 550-'5.1.1 <freebsdnic@mailbox.cps.intel.com>... User unknown' (delivery attempts: 0)

Fix: 

Ask Intel to provide a working email address.
How-To-Repeat: mail freebsdnic@mailbox.intel.com
